final:
module RefModule(
    input wire CK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if(RST) begin
            Q <= 4'b0;
        end
        else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
